name: Optimize scanner throughput across representative repos

description: Baseline: scanner throughput harness over agent-ci, umami, astro, and openclaw with test+build checks
Precompile ignore regexes and switch discovery language lookup to a simple loop
Avoid a second TypeScript source file parse for logical LOC and count physical lines without text.split allocations
Disable AST parent links and pass variable names explicitly for anonymous function names
Disable AST parent links with explicit arrow-function names and path-based logging detection
Replace nested statement rescans in test mock setup extraction with a single-pass active-statement traversal
Skip hasAwait scans for non-async functions and skip duplicate fingerprints for test files
Skip hasAwait scans for non-async functions and avoid duplicate-signature fingerprints for test files
Remove parent-link helper dependencies so TypeScript ASTs can be created without parent pointers
Combine duplicate-fingerprint node counting and local-name collection into one traversal
Replace per-try subtree rescans with a single traversal that accumulates boundary categories for active try blocks
Disable TypeScript AST parent pointers after removing direct parent and getText helper dependencies
Skip test mock AST walks for test files whose text lacks any mock-related substrings
Match mock-related call paths from path segments before joining the full expression path string
Short-circuit await detection with a dedicated recursive search instead of the generic walk helper
